rule_metadata.name: serveo_net
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'serveo.net' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule serveo_net
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'serveo.net' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "serveo.net"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /http\:\/\/.{0,1000}\.serveo\.net/ nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = /https\:\/\/.{0,1000}\.serveo\.net/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
